name: 1.8" ST7735 TFT Module (128x160, SPI, MSP1803)
description: Generic 1.8 inch 128x160 TFT module (ST7735, lcdwiki MSP1803), SPI 8-pin main header + 4-pin SD header, 34.5x58mm board, four 3.2mm holes. Main header pin1=VCC is on the RIGHT in front view (vendor drawing is back-view).
dimensions_source: lcdwiki MSP1803 back-view drawing (pixel-verified): board 34.5x58, holes D3.2 at 3.0 insets (28.5x52), J2 8-pin 2.54 bottom (row 2.5, centered, back-view L-R VCC GND CS RESET AO SDA SCK LED - mirrored for front), J4 SD 4-pin top centered. Glass dims not in drawing (footprint-complete).
